prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约15918名、16821名、16015名、7668名、7392名。2021–2023年位次在16000名附近波动，2024年因招生计划大幅缩减（从68 人降至33人）位次跃升至7668名，2025年进一步小幅提升至7392名，近两年累计前移约8623名，显示学校在广东物理类考生中的竞争力和吸引力显著增强；该校 在广东物理类招生计划：2021年74人、2022年70人、2023年68人、2024年33人、2025年33人、2026年33人。2024年大幅缩招后位次大幅提升，2025–2026年计划持平，但广东省物 理类考生总数从2025年440208人增至2026年456000人（+3.6%），竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 大连理工大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026 年位列第28名，属于顶尖工科强校，近年排名稳定在28–32名区间；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及2023年电信学部录取断档至60000名的历史事 件，但该事件已过去三年，影响逐渐淡化；抖音热度为较热（总排名第55位），短视频平台曝光量中等偏上，社会关注度尚可；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与 技术获评A+，力学、土木工程、机械工程、软件工程、管理科学与工程、工商管理获评A，控制科学与工程、环境科学与工程、生物医学工程获评A-，共10个A-及以上学科，工科 实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续高热推荐，与该校优势学科高度契合；人工智能谨慎观望，机械/智能制造分化观望。广东省2026年物理类考生较2025年增加约3.6%；大连理工大学位于辽宁省，非广东 省本地高校，但作为全国性985高校，在广东招生规模稳定（33人/年），跨省报考受地域偏好影响较小。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024–2025年位次持续前移的强势走势、2026年招 生计划持平、广东省物理类考生小幅增加（+3.6%）以及学校声誉偏负面但影响有限等因素，在2025年基准7392名基础上预计竞争略加剧，位次小幅后移。预测最低位次约7442名 ，区间6942–7942名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 15918, 16821, 16015, 7668, and 7392 respectively. Rankings fluctuated around 16000 from 2021 to 2023. In 2024, due to a significant reduction in enrollment plan (from 68 to 33), the ranking jumped to 7668, and further slightly improved to 7392 in 2025, with a cumulative forward shift of about 8623 positions over the past two years, indicating a significant enhancement in the university's competitiveness and attractiveness among Physics Category candidates in Guangdong. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangdong: 74 in 2021, 70 in 2022, 68 in 2023, 33 in 2024, 33 in 2025, and 33 in 2026. After the substantial enrollment reduction in 2024, rankings greatly improved. The plan remains stable from 2025 to 2026, but the total number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong increased from 440208 in 2025 to 456000 in 2026 (+3.6%), leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Dalian University of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 28th, belonging to top-tier strong engineering schools, with stable rankings in the 28–32 range in recent years. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving the historical incident of the 2023 telecommunications department admission gap dropping to 60000, but this event has passed three years and its impact is gradually fading. On Douyin, its popularity is relatively hot (ranked 55th overall), with medium-to-high exposure on short video platforms and moderate social attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A+, Mechanics, Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Software Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, and Business Administration were rated A, Control Science and Engineering, Environmental Science and Engineering, and Biomedical Engineering were rated A-, totaling 10 A- and above disciplines, demonstrating strong engineering strength and strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly popular and recommended, highly aligned with the university's advantageous disciplines. Artificial Intelligence is cautiously observed, while Mechanical/Intelligent Manufacturing is observed with divergence. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong increased by about 3.6% compared to 2025. Dalian University of Technology is located in Liaoning Province, not a local university in Guangdong, but as a national 985 university, its enrollment scale in Guangdong is stable (33 per year), and cross-province applications are less affected by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong upward trend of rankings from 2024 to 2025, the stable enrollment plan in 2026, the slight increase in Physics Category candidates in Guangdong (+3.6%), and the slightly negative but limited impact of the university's reputation, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 7392, with rankings slightly moving backward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 7442, with a range of 6942 to 7942.

- Artificial Intelligence (Future Technology Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)

- Artificial Intelligence (Innovation Class)

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Intelligent Unmanned Systems Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 6942–7942, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors such as Electronic Information and Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering as the main application direction. Tier 1 majors like Artificial Intelligence Master Class and Computer Top Talent Class can be attempted as reach options, while Tier 3 majors like Materials serve as safety choices. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 6942), it is advisable to primarily target Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2024, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 4838, and in 2025 it was about 4617, with a forward shift of about 221 places, indicating an increase in the university's appeal among Guangdong History Category candidates; the enrollment plan for History Category in Guangdong: 25 in 2024, 25 in 2025, and 15 in 2026. The 2026 plan is significantly reduced by 10 (-40%) compared to 2025, a substantial reduction that will intensify competition. Meanwhile, the total number of History Category candidates in Guangdong increased from 292,200 in 2025 to 326,200 in 2026 (+11.6%), with a notable expansion in candidate scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Dalian University of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, ranked 28th in the 2026 Soft Science Ranking. Although it excels in engineering, as a top 985 university it still has strong appeal for liberal arts candidates; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, but mainly involves engineering-related incidents, with limited impact on liberal arts admissions; Douyin popularity is relatively high, overall attention is moderately high; Business Administration is rated A, closely related to the History Category enrollment majors such as Public Administration and Intellectual Property; Philosophy, Journalism and Communication, English and other majors, although not directly corresponding to A-class disciplines, rely on the 985 platform for overall strong strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Law major is socially recommended, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended. The number of History Category candidates in Guangdong in 2026 increased by about 11.6% compared to 2025.
7. [Regional Factor] Dalian University of Technology is located in Liaoning Province, not a local university in Guangdong, with a small History Category enrollment scale (only 15 in 2026), and cross-provincial applications are limited by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slight forward trend in 2025 rankings, the significant 40% reduction in 2026 enrollment plan, the notable increase in Guangdong History Category candidates (+11.6%), and the limited impact of university reputation, competition is expected to intensify significantly based on the 2025 baseline of 4617, with a substantial backward shift in ranking. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3559, with a range of 3059–4059.
